name: Creamed Spinach
recipeIngredient: 6 oz Cream cheese, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small heat-resistant, non-metallic bowl, melt butter in Microwave Oven for 30 seconds.
2. Add onions and heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 4 minutes or until the onion is lightly browned. Stir occasionally.
3. Cook spinach. Drain well.
4. Combine browned onion, spinach, salt, pepper, nutmeg, and cream cheese in a shallow, 1 1/2-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole. If desired, add milk to make a thinner mixture.
5. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 5 to 6 minutes or until heated through.
